nasb.text: “Accept these things from them, that they may be used in the service of the tent of meeting, and you shall give them to the Levites, to each man according to his service.”

esv.text: “Accept these from them, that they may be used in the service of the tent of meeting, and give them to the Levites, to each man according to his service.”

cnv.text: “你要把這些收下，好作會幕事務的使用；你要把這些交給利未人，要按照各人所辦的事務給他們。”

ccb.text: “你要收下这些供物，按利未人的工作分配给他们，供会幕使用。”
